statement.en: Optimisation of Low-Rise Lightweight Steel-Framed Residential Building Design in China’s Hot-Summer-Cold-Winter Zone by Life-Cycle Carbon Analysis

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint dated 2026-04-25 (future date, likely metadata error or speculative submission) presenting empirical optimization research. The claim combines engineering design (formalizeable) with LCA carbon accounting (partially formalizeable) and regional applicability (context-dependent). The work is not yet peer-validated, empirical results are provisional, and the optimization landscape itself evolves with building codes and carbon accounting standards.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 鋼と温度のダンスが、半世紀の呼吸として炭素を紡ぐ。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 鋼の箱が上下の極端な気候を耐え、内部の効率は時間とともに振動する。
